lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: Are you in need of some runes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you get your runes from?

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: That is not the kind of information I intend to give to a human.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: Because before the Varlamorians decided to open their lands up to visitors, Cam Torum was the sole supplier of runes to the entire region.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... But that's not the case anymore. With the kingdom open, they can just get their runes from the mainland.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: A fact I'm all too aware of, especially given the impact it is having on my prices.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: Nevertheless, there is still a benefit to having a source of runes closer to home, and I do not intend to share any information on that source.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: Now, are you in need of some runes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can trust me. I won't tell anyone else.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: You display the typical arrogance of a human. I am a Dwarf of Cam Torum. My people have mastered Smithing and Magic in equal measure.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: That little trinket of yours may well work wonders on a lesser mind, but you will find it to be of little use here.

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: Now, are you in need of some runes?

lines.speaker: Nahta
lines.text: Then we have nothing more to discuss.
